name: sla
help:
usage: sa sla <command> [options]

Commands:
  build      <file> [--out <file>]        Compile a .sla source to .sa
  build-exe  <file> [sa-build-exe args]  Compile a .sla source to a native executable
  check      <file>                       Parse and type-check a .sla source
  test       <file> [sa-test args]        Compile and run @test blocks through sa test
  help                                    Show this help message

Options:
  -h, --help                              Show this help message
